name: Munora - 72"H 5-Tier Heavy Duty Garage Shelving - Adjustable Storage for Warehouse/Basement - 16"D x 35"W - Black
description: This 5-tier garage shelving unit delivers industrial-strength storage in a space-efficient design. The black steel unit (16"D x 35"W x 72"H) supports 2,500 lbs total, with each shelf holding 500 lbs thanks to thickened legs and under-shelf reinforcing bars. An adjustable interlocking beam system allows 1" height increments, adapting to store tools, boxes, or large equipment. The powder-coated cold-rolled steel resists rust and corrosion, making it ideal for garages, basements, workshops, or kitchens. Freestanding and versatile, the shelving assembles in 20 minutes with the included hammer and gloves—no nuts or bolts required. Shipped with a 1-year warranty, this unit combines durability and flexibility for all storage needs.
